action.reasoning: Observation: DenseNet encoder fails because denseblock3 outputs 1024 channels, not 512. DenseNet-121: denseblock1→256ch, transition1→128ch, denseblock2→512ch, transition2→256ch, denseblock3→1024ch. Analysis: Simple channel count bug. Also the model was barely learning after 54 epochs - need better training. Decision: Fix the encoder (1024 channels), also improve the training with better LR schedule and data augmentation. The architecture is otherwise sound - 29M params, d_model=512, 6 decoder layers.
